Bash(gdb_test.py << 'PYEOF'
from pwn import *
context.binary = './deploy/prob'
context.log_level = 'info'

p = process\('./deploy/prob'\)
pid = p.pid

# Read /proc/pid/maps to see all mappings
import time
time.sleep\(0.5\)
maps = open\(f'/proc/{pid}/maps'\).read\(\)
print\("=== MEMORY MAP ==="\)
for line in maps.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\):
    if 'prob' in line or 'libc' in line or 'heap' in line or 'stack' in line or \('rw-p' in line and '00000000' in line.split\(\)[2]\):
        print\(line\)

print\("\\n=== KEY ADDRESSES ==="\)
# Find PIE base
for line in maps.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\):
    if 'prob' in line and 'r-xp' in line:
        pie_base = int\(line.split\('-'\)[0], 16\)
        print\(f"PIE base: {hex\(pie_base\)}"\)
        break

# Find libc base
for line in maps.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\):
    if 'libc' in line and 'r-xp' in line:
        libc_base = int\(line.split\('-'\)[0], 16\)
        print\(f"libc base: {hex\(libc_base\)}"\)
        break

# Find the big mmap \(custom heap\) - 1GB anon mmap
for line in maps.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\):
    parts = line.split\(\)
    if len\(parts\) >= 5 and 'rw-p' in line and parts[-1] == '0':
        start = int\(parts[0].split\('-'\)[0], 16\)
        end = int\(parts[0].split\('-'\)[1], 16\)
        size = end - start
        if size >= 0x4000000:  # >= 64MB \(the custom heap uses 64MB of 1GB\)
            print\(f"Custom heap: {hex\(start\)}-{hex\(end\)} \(size={hex\(size\)}\)"\)
            custom_heap = start
            break

print\(f"\\nCage object at PIE+0xe300 = {hex\(pie_base + 0xe300\)}"\)
print\(f"mailbox ptr at PIE+0xe2e0 = {hex\(pie_base + 0xe2e0\)}"\)
print\(f"Distance heap→PIE: {hex\(pie_base - custom_heap\)} \({pie_base - custom_heap}\)"\)
print\(f"Distance heap→libc: {hex\(libc_base - custom_heap\)} \({libc_base - custom_heap}\)"\)

p.kill\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash(gdb_deep.py << 'PYEOF'
from pwn import *
import time

context.binary = './deploy/prob'
context.log_level = 'warn'

# Run 3 times to check if distance is stable
for i in range\(3\):
    p = process\('./deploy/prob'\)
    pid = p.pid
    time.sleep\(0.3\)
    maps = open\(f'/proc/{pid}/maps'\).read\(\)
    
    custom_heap = pie = libc = glibc_heap = 0
    for line in maps.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\):
        parts = line.split\(\)
        start = int\(parts[0].split\('-'\)[0], 16\)
        end = int\(parts[0].split\('-'\)[1], 16\)
        
        if 'prob' in line and 'r-xp' in line:
            pie = start - 0x2000  # r-xp at +0x2000
        elif 'libc' in line and 'r--p' in line and libc == 0:
            libc = start
        elif '[heap]' in line:
            glibc_heap = start
        elif 'rw-p' in line and end - start >= 0x4000000 and 'prob' not in line and 'libc' not in line:
            custom_heap = start
    
    print\(f"Run {i}: heap={hex\(custom_heap\)} PIE={hex\(pie\)} libc={hex\(libc\)} glibc_heap={hex\(glibc_heap\)}"\)
    print\(f"  PIE-heap={hex\(\(pie-custom_heap\) & 0xffffffffffffffff\)} libc-heap={hex\(\(libc-custom_heap\) & 0xffffffffffffffff\)}"\)
    
    # Read Cage object from .bss to find Bins vector pointer
    cage_addr = pie + 0xe300
    try:
        mem = open\(f'/proc/{pid}/mem', 'rb'\)
        mem.seek\(cage_addr\)
        cage_data = mem.read\(64\)
        base = u64\(cage_data[0:8]\)
        top = u64\(cage_data[8:16]\)
        bound = u64\(cage_data[16:24]\)
        # vector<set> internal: _M_start, _M_finish, _M_end_of_storage
        bins_start = u64\(cage_data[24:32]\)
        bins_finish = u64\(cage_data[32:40]\)
        bins_end = u64\(cage_data[40:48]\)
        debugmode = u32\(cage_data[48:52]\)
        print\(f"  Cage: Base={hex\(base\)} Top={hex\(top\)} bound={hex\(bound\)}"\)
        print\(f"  Bins vector: start={hex\(bins_start\)} \(glibc heap\)"\)
        print\(f"  glibc_heap_base={hex\(glibc_heap\)}, bins_off={hex\(bins_start-glibc_heap\)}"\)
        mem.close\(\)
    except:
        print\("  \(couldn't read /proc/mem\)"\)
    
    p.kill\(\)
PYEOF)
